bio.en: Software engineer specialized in backend development with Java and Spring Boot, comfortable working with JavaScript and Python. I enjoy building personal projects to keep learning, with a growing interest in infrastructure.
bio.es: Software engineer especializado en backend con Java y Spring Boot, con soltura en JavaScript y Python. Disfruto creando proyectos personales para seguir aprendiendo, con un interés creciente en el mundo de la infraestructura.
